classified_questions.question: What is the definition of absolute value or modulus in complex numbers?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: How can we use the property $|ab|=|a|\cdot|b|$ to simplify the expression $\left|\left(\frac35+\frac45i\right)^6\right|$?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How can we express $\left(\frac35+\frac45i\right)^6$ in polar form?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How can we use De Moivre's Theorem to calculate $\left(\frac35+\frac45i\right)^6$ in polar form?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Based on our calculations, what is the final result for $\left|\left(\frac35+\frac45i\right)^6\right|$?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Can we use the same method to calculate the modulus of other complex numbers raised to a power? What are some examples?
